data.title: Binance Finance, One-click Coin Purchase, Flash Exchange, and Leverage will be launched on Defi App (HOME)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Financial Management, One-click Coin Buying, Flash Exchange, and Leverage will be launched on Defi App (HOME).
HOME's principal-guaranteed coin-earning current product was launched at 23:00 (UTC+8) on June 12, and simultaneously supports "one-click coin buying", flash exchange, and leverage trading services. Within one hour of the spot launch, users can trade HOME with credit cards or wallet balances, and can also exchange for BTC, USDT, etc. without handling fees. The leverage platform will simultaneously open HOME borrowing and trading pairs.

data.title: Polygon Brings Native POL Token to Solana via Wormhole’s NTT Framework
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Wormhole announced that Polygon has introduced its native POL token to Solana through its Native Token Transfer (NTT) framework. By leveraging NTT, Polygon can maintain the integrity of POL's core functions (such as supporting transactions, ensuring network security, and supporting community governance).

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net inflow of 1,413 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net inflow of 76,694 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net inflow of 1,413 BTC, of ​​which BlackRock had an inflow of 1,204 BTC. BlackRock currently holds 666,842 BTC, worth US$71.59 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net inflow of 76,694 ETH, of which BlackRock had an inflow of 58,112 ETH. BlackRock currently holds 1,613,919 ETH, worth US$4.45 billion.

data.title: Dollar weakens as data supports Fed rate cut
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The increasing likelihood of a Fed rate cut has constrained the dollar. The dollar has come under pressure as Trump recalibrates the United States' geopolitical leadership and pushes forward his aggressive tariff agenda. Most importantly, data showed slowing inflation and a slowing job market, increasing the likelihood that the Fed will cut interest rates in early fall or even earlier.
After getting the May PPI report, economists will be able to accurately predict the data of the Fed's preferred inflation indicator. Most analysts who made forecasts expect core PCE to rise 0.1% to 0.2% month-on-month in May, a mild figure that is roughly consistent with the Fed's 2% annualized inflation target. Due to the base effect of data in the past few months, the annual PCE rate may rise to 2.6% from 2.5% in April. Pansen macroeconomists believe that the good news will not last long, and they expect that tariffs may force retailers to raise prices in the coming months as inventories decrease. (Jinshi)

data.title: Former Obama Presidential Campaign Manager David Plouffe to Join Coinbase Global Advisory Board
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: American Democratic strategist David Plouffe will join Coinbase's global advisory board. It is reported that Plouffe served as an important consultant in Harris' presidential campaign and also served as Obama's campaign manager. He is famous for helping Obama successfully win the US presidential election and held a position in the White House. (Politico)

data.title: Sonic Labs: Invested 400,000 S tokens in Hey Anon project
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Sonic Labs announced on the X platform that it has invested 400,000 S tokens in the Hey Anon project through its Sonic Innovator Fund

data.title: Federal Reserve's Potential Rate Cut Pressures Dollar Amid Geopolitical Shifts
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the likelihood of the Federal Reserve implementing a rate cut is increasing, which is exerting pressure on the U.S. dollar. As U.S. President Donald Trump repositions America's geopolitical leadership and advances his aggressive tariff agenda, the dollar has already been under strain.

Key economic indicators reveal a slowdown in inflation and the job market, heightening the possibility of the Federal Reserve reducing interest rates by early autumn or even sooner.

data.title: Greeks.live: Bitcoin may start to pull back from the current level of about $110,500
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live macro researcher Adam released an English community briefing, which pointed out that the group generally holds a bearish view and firmly believes that Bitcoin will start to pull back from the current level of about $110,500. Shorts are confident that Bitcoin will be weak after failing to break through $110,500 three times, while bulls continue to hold their ground and call out a target price of $145,000. The market outlook is clearly divided.

data.title: BlackRock's Ethereum Purchases Reach $570 Million Over Two Weeks
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Arkham indicates that addresses associated with BlackRock have been purchasing Ethereum daily for the past two weeks. The total value of Ethereum acquired during this period amounts to $570 million.

data.title: Hong Kong Customs and the University of Hong Kong jointly organise a regional anti-money laundering capacity building workshop
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The "Regional Anti-Money Laundering Capacity Building Workshop: New Challenges in the Traditional and Digital Ages" co-organized by the Hong Kong Customs and the University of Hong Kong was held for four consecutive days from June 9th and ended successfully today (June 12th). Following the signing of a memorandum of cooperation at the International Forum on Combating Money Laundering and Transnational Organized Crime in December last year, the Hong Kong Customs and the University of Hong Kong held this workshop to further strengthen the Customs' capacity building work in combating money laundering, especially the trend of virtual assets and the risks they bring. It is reported that the Hong Kong Customs is working with the University of Hong Kong to develop a digital tool to track cryptocurrency transactions used in suspected money laundering schemes. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: WLFI official website adds Swap, lending and APP modules, but the functions are not yet open
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: WLFI official website has been updated, adding Swap, lending and WLFI APP modules. Currently, the above functions are still in the preview state and have not yet been officially launched.

data.title: Hong Kong Customs and University Collaborate on Anti-Money Laundering Workshop
data.description: According to Odaily, a workshop titled 'Regional Anti-Money Laundering Capacity Building: New Challenges in the Traditional and Digital Era' was held from June 9 to June 12, organized by Hong Kong Customs and the University of Hong Kong. This event follows the signing of a memorandum of understanding between the two entities at an international forum on combating money laundering and transnational organized crime in December last year. The workshop aimed to enhance the capabilities of customs officials in tackling money laundering, with a particular focus on the trends and risks associated with virtual assets. Hong Kong Customs is reportedly collaborating with the University of Hong Kong to develop a digital tool designed to track cryptocurrency transactions involved in suspected money laundering schemes.

data.title: LBank launches LBANK EDGE and sets up a $5 million ecological fund
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank announced the official launch of LBANK EDGE, focusing on the value discovery and top liquidity support of cutting-edge assets, and is committed to becoming the "value portal" for users. LBANK EDGE can achieve spot and contract trading within 1 hour after the target appears. The special zone has been officially opened, and special activities have been launched to reduce initial trading risks.
At the same time, LBank has established a $5 million ecological fund to support the market expansion and ecological cooperation of high-potential projects, and jointly build a sustainable and win-win LBANK EDGE ecology.

data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance announced that it has issued an additional 409 SKATE tokens to users who successfully received SKATE.

data.title: Plasma $1B Deposit Cap Reached in Record Time Before Token Sale Even Starts
data.description:
TL;DR Plasma doubled its deposit cap to $1 billion, reaching this limit in just 30 minutes. The increase responds to community concerns about bot activity and the rapid sellout of initial deposits. The project aims to offer stablecoin infrastructure on Bitcoin with zero gas fees, starting with USDT. Plasma, the stablecoin-focused blockchain, raised its deposit. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/plasma-1b-deposit-cap-reached-in-record-time-before-token-sale-even-starts/
